title: Sprint Status Schema
description: Schema for sprint-status.yaml — the development status tracking file generated by sprint-planning

generated.description: Timestamp when this status file was generated (human-readable, e.g. '2025-05-06 21:30')

project_key.description: Project key for tracker integrations (NOKEY for file-system)

tracking_system.description: Tracking system being used. Values: file-system, jira, linear, trello — or any domain-appropriate value

story_location.description: Location of story files (relative or absolute path)

development_status.description: Flat key-value map of all tracked items and their current status. Keys follow the pattern: 'epic-{N}', '{N}-{M}-{kebab-title}', or 'epic-{N}-retrospective'.

additionalProperties.description: Status value. 'drafted' and 'contexted' are legacy aliases normalized on read.

sprints.description: Optional goal-based sprint groupings. Each key is a sprint ID (e.g. 'sprint_1', 'mvp'). Stories not listed in any sprint appear under 'Unscheduled'.

goal.description: The sprint's delivery goal (e.g. 'MVP scope', 'Beta launch', 'Performance hardening')

start_date.description: Optional sprint start date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

end_date.description: Optional sprint end date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

stories.description: Ordered list of story/epic/retro keys assigned to this sprint (matching keys in development_status)

statusDefinitions.description: Reference for valid status values per item type
